summary: Phase 1 security/UX overhaul: backend + frontend verified. Created /app/backend/tests/test_phase1_security.py (10 tests, 10/10 PASS) covering security headers on /api/ (external) and /health (localhost), ChatMessageInput validation (empty/2001 chars => 422; boundary 2000 accepted), AI rate limit guard (seeded 100 chat_messages -> 429), admin login + list_users aggregation regression, advisor short-chat streaming. Frontend Playwright run covered landing (hero, demo scan, secure installer, no irm|iex), 4 new public pages (/security /privacy-telemetry /changelog /pricing), IT/EN language switch, and login regression to /app: 27/28 assertions PASS (2 initial 'IT hero copy' misses were false negatives because browser locale defaulted to EN; a follow-up run confirmed IT/EN copy both work via LanguageSwitcher).

minor.issue: Endpoint is defined without /api prefix in server.py, so the k8s ingress routes external /health to the FRONTEND (returns HTML) instead of backend JSON. Backend /health works only via http://localhost:8001/health. If health is meant to be probed by external monitoring / uptime tools it must be mounted as /api/health (or an infra route override added).

action_items: OPTIONAL: Move /health under /api/health (or add ingress route) so external monitors can reach the backend JSON status. Currently only reachable via localhost.
OPTIONAL (from prev iterations, still applicable): auth cookies still set with secure=False regardless of scheme; consider driving from env before production deploy.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py security_headers middleware is correct and applied to /api/* responses (verified 6/6 headers present). Note: because /health is not under /api it is not reachable through the k8s /api ingress route.

advisor.py _check_ai_rate_limit uses count_documents with created_at >= (now-1h) ISO string filter; ISO lexicographic compare works only because created_at is always UTC iso from now_iso() — acceptable but comment/typing would help.
advisor_chat inserts the user chat_message AFTER the rate-limit check and AFTER building history, so under a race the guard remains correct.
admin.list_users uses async iteration over aggregation cursors and includes counts — clean and free of _id leakage (uses _public()).
models.ChatMessageInput validates min_length=1 and max_length=2000; both boundaries verified 422/200 respectively.

Landing.jsx contains no irm|iex command as expected; the insecure remote-install line only remains in authenticated pages (BiosRestore, DesktopAgent, Games, Live, Network, Profiles) where users authenticate with their agent token — flag if these are meant to be replaced too as part of the same Phase 1 policy.

success_rate.frontend: 96% (27/28) — 1 assertion was a false negative caused by browser default locale=EN; both languages verified working

seed_data_creation: Rate-limit test inserts 100 fake chat_messages with session_id='__ratelimit_test_<ts>__' and cleans them up (delete_many) in a try/finally; also removes any 'over-limit' user messages if the request wasn't blocked before insert.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend Phase 1 additions verified end-to-end. If retesting /health, use localhost:8001; external URL returns frontend HTML because /health has no /api prefix. Rate-limit test relies on pymongo sync driver against MONGO_URL/DB_NAME env; the async motor DB used by the backend shares the same collection so the seeded docs are visible to the API within the same request.
